name: Valparaiso
summary: The Chilean port from which the Morrison Co.'s freighter Vigilant was bound when she arrived at Sydney towing the derelict Alert; the Vigilant left Valparaiso on March 25th.
description:
Valparaiso was the port of departure of the Morrison Co.'s freighter Vigilant, which arrived at its wharf in Darling Harbour with the battled and disabled steam yacht Alert in tow.

The Vigilant left Valparaiso on March 25th, and on April 2d was driven considerably south of her course by exceptionally heavy storms and monster waves — the deviation that put her in the way of the derelict and her lone survivor.

sources.quote: The Morrison Co.'s freighter Vigilant, bound from Valparaiso, arrived this morning at its wharf in Darling Harbour
sources.context: Chapter 3, The Madness from the Sea

sources.quote: The Vigilant left Valparaiso March 25th, and on April 2d was driven considerably south of her course by exceptionally heavy storms and monster waves.
